name: John Weaver, Chief Strategist
subject: I was wrong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich For America, www
body:
[

](www.JohnKasich.com)
When Gov. John Kasich asked me for a prediction in July, I'd thought he'd be #3 in New Hampshire by Labor Day. As it turns out, I was wrong.
[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30253361:28994590533:m:1:958431888:0BB7B87574FCA57CB51805A316F2FFBD:r)

A poll released over the weekend confirmed what we've seen in several consecutive polls now. **Gov. Kasich has already risen to #2 in New Hampshire!**
**[Peter, please help us keep up the momentum!](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30253361:28994590533:m:1:958431888:0BB7B87574FCA57CB51805A316F2FFBD:r)**
[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30253362:28994590533:m:1:958431888:0BB7B87574FCA57CB51805A316F2FFBD:r)
Gov. Kasich is doing so well in New Hampshire because voters like the conservative message they're hearing. He has a positive vision for our country and it's both uplifting and refreshing.
**Here's a short video with some clips from last week's travel:**
[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30253363:28994590533:m:1:958431888:0BB7B87574FCA57CB51805A316F2FFBD:r)
With your support, we can keep up our momentum and raise the resources we'll need to win the primary and go on to defeat Hillary!
Thank you for all that you're doing to help.
Sincerely,
**John Weaver
**Chief Strategist

[

](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30253362:28994590533:m:1:958431888:0BB7B87574FCA57CB51805A316F2FFBD:r)
Paid for by Kasich For America, www.JohnKasich.com

name: Team Marco
subject: Last week on MarcoRubio.com
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
Peter,

We wanted to update you
about Marco's campaign website: We've been updating it all the
time with coverage of his big policy speeches and his campaign
events.

Here's what we've put up in
the last week or so:

Just over a week ago, Marco
gave a big speech in Charleston, S.C., about the policies he'd
pursue to deal with the rise of China. His ideas are based on the
Rubio doctrine, and include a stronger military, especially one
that can sustain more air and sea patrols in the Pacific, more
efforts to protect our economy from unfair Chinese policies, and
a greater emphasis on human rights.

Click here to read Marco's
full remarks.

At the beginning of last
week, Marco made a historic trip to northern Nevada, visiting
four different cities and towns, including one that had never
hosted a candidate before: Yerington, Nevada. We got big crowds,
and Marco got a great reception highlighting his longtime status
as an outsider, from his insurgent primary run to this
presidential race, where the establishment urged him to wait his
turn.

Click here to read more.

In Oklahoma City last week,
Marco gave a talk to a gathering of oil-and-gas industry leaders,
laying out a few things he'd like to do on energy policy. There's
more to come this fall, but what Marco did have to say about a
21st century vision for American energy policy got a great
reception.

Click here to read his
speech.

We announced Marco's
Massachusetts leadership team last week, and we're really pleased
with it. He's got three state senators (half the GOP members of
the body!) on board, including the assistant minority leader,
plus two young, energetic state representatives and Bob Maginn,
the former chairman of the state party.

Read more about the team
here.

Marco made a whirlwind trip
through New Hampshire at the end of August, visiting four towns
and three counties in just a day. He met with students in
Hanover, stopped at a service center in Orford, visited a VFW in
Littleton, and ended the day with an overflowing town hall
meeting in Londonderry.

Read more about the trip
here.

When he was in the Palmetto
State, Marco also met with voters in Myrtle Beach and Indian
Land. He did a town hall at the University of South Carolina too,
and gave a quick talk to the men's and women's basketball teams.

Read more here.

We're always adding more
and more great content, so check in on the homepage of
MarcoRubio.com, and follow us on Facebook and Twitter to stay
updated.

- Team Marco

DONATE

Paid for by Marco Rubio for President

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Too many emails? Click here to receive updates less often:
https://marcorubio.com/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com

Unsubscribe: https://marcorubio.com/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com

PO Box 558701 | Miami, FL 33255-8701

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: PETITION: Student Debt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Friends,

I'm a CPA. Debt is not something I like to see.

But I have friends who are struggling with suffocating student debt. And I've seen it prevent too many borrowers from buying a home, starting a family, or starting a small business.

**That makes me nervous.** Not only because it inhibits my friends, but in a larger sense, it hurts Florida's economy by crippling new generations of businesses and families.

**That 's why I'm encouraged by Hillary Clinton's plan to make the steep cost of a college education more affordable. **

I want to make debt-free college a reality for all Americans, not just the wealthiest 1%. [**Please, add your name here if you are with me in this fight.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae20f3/738133e4/3af831bc/7f88a355/1570467506/VEsH/ "http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/e150909b")

Across America over 40 million people are weighed down by student debt. In fact, student debt now exceeds credit card debt as the single biggest financial obstacle for middle class families.

That doesn't just hurt students. **When hard-working families can 't get out from under student debt, that hurts the entire economy.**

That's just unacceptable. We need to reduce the crippling burden of existing student debt for my generation and future generations. Florida's kids deserve nothing less. [**Will you join me in this fight? Add your name.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae20f3/738133e4/3af831bc/7f88a355/1570467506/VEsE/ "http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/e150909b")

Thanks for your support. Let's get this done.

\--Patrick | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae20f3/738133e4/3af831bc/7f88a356/1570467506/VEsF/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
---
